exception.game.playercount: The game requires a minimum of %d players to start, only %d present
napkin.message.mafia: Each night, vote for one person to eliminate along with the other mafiosi.
napkin.message.boss: Each night vote for one person to be killed with the other mafiosi. You also have the ability to target an additional person each night.
napkin.message.detective: Each night, investigate one person to find out if they are a mafioso.
napkin.message.medic: Each night, choose one person to save from the mafia. You can protect yourself, but not twice in a row!
napkin.message.escort: Each night, choose one person to distract, protecting them from harm. If you target a mafioso, you will be eliminated in the morning.
napkin.message.none: You are an useless drag of society... Better luck next time! Lmao
napkin.interact: Press §7[right-click]§r while holding this item to reveal your role
message.game.dinner-begin: The Night approaches and all guests should go attend the dinner...
message.phase2.announce-breakfast: Good morning survivors, you should go to have breakfast and find out who survived...
message.game.stalemate:
Hey, this was a stalemate! Back to voting!
The players: %s got the same number of votes: %d
message.game.voted-out: A player by the name of %s got voted out with %d votes
message.phase2.announce-morning: Good evening, we have something to share.
